name: Zhongtong Bus Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhongtong Bus Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells buses in China. It offers coaches, city buses, group buses, electric buses, stock buses, and luxury business buses, as well as public and tourist buses, highway buses, and school buses. The company also exports its products to approximately 90 countries and regions. Zhongtong Bus Co.,Ltd. was formerly known as Zhongtong Bus Holding Co.,ltd. and changed its name to Zhongtong Bus Co.,Ltd. in January 2021. Zhongtong Bus Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is based in Liaocheng, China.
